Partnership Opportunity

Become a Morzze Dealer

Join our network of premium furniture dealers and bring luxury living to your customers. Partner with India's fastest-growing luxury furniture brand.

Apply Now

Avg. Margins

Why Partner with Morzze?

We provide comprehensive support to help your business thrive in the luxury furniture market

Exclusive Product

Access to our complete product range including exclusive dealer-only collections and early releases

Competitive Margins

Attractive wholesale pricing with margins up to 40% on select products and volume discounts.

Priority Logistics

Fast-track order processing, dedicated shipping support, and flexible delivery options.

Marketing Support

Co-branded marketing materials, showroom displays, digital assets, and promotional support

Dedicated Support

Personal account manager, technical training, and 24/7 customer service for your clients.

Territory Protection

Exclusive territory rights ensuring no competing dealers within your designated area.

Territory Coverage

We are actively expanding our dealer network across India. Check our current coverage and available territories for new partnerships.

Apply to Become a Dealer

Fill out the form below and our partnership team will contact you within 5 business days.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about becoming a Morzze dealer.

The initial review takes 3-5 business days. If approved, we'll schedule a site visit and interview within 2 weeks. The complete onboarding process typically takes 4-6 weeks from application to first order.

Have Questions?

Our partnership team is here to help. Reach out for more information about the dealer program.

info@morzze.com+91 124 467 8900
